commits.message: fix: move close_stock_position from AlpacaStreamClient to AlpacaDirectIntegration
fix: repair broker protocol violations in engine.py and add missing get_orders method
fix: correct broken ArbOpportunity field references in thesis_service.py
chore: fix ruff lint errors and replace bare except blocks

tasks.summary: Moved close_stock_position() from AlpacaStreamClient (WS class) to AlpacaDirectIntegration (REST class) — runtime crash when broker.py called the method
Replaced get_account() with get_account_snapshot() in engine.py, added missing get_orders() method to BrokerClient protocol and 3 broker implementations
Fixed 8 broken ArbOpportunity field references (kalshi_best_ask_yes→kalshi_yes_ask, etc.), removed nonexistent 'direction' field
Replaced bare except: pass blocks with specific exception types + logging across 11 files

push_status: deferred — no GitHub auth token available in environment
notes: Pre-existing ruff issues in autopilot.py (E401, F401, F841) also fixed as opportunistic cleanup
